reference_goals: Linear guidance — rail/block interface, preload adjustment, wiper lip
Ball screw drive — nut housing, angular contact bearings, axial preload
Motor mount — NEMA/servo flange, coupling guard, belt/direct drive
Carriage structure — gantry plate, ribbing, tool mount interface
Cable management — drag chain, protected cable channel, connector panel
Sensor integration — home/limit switch mount, linear encoder scale
needed_metadata: BOM — rail type (HGR/SBR), screw lead/diameter, motor NEMA size, bearing type
Accuracy specs — positioning repeatability, backlash, thermal growth
Lubrication schedule — grease type, interval, fitting locations
Assembly sequence — rail alignment, bearing preload, motor coupling
needed_engineering_docs: Structural boundary — cutting force vector, acceleration loads, deflection limit
Thermal boundary — motor/bearing heat, thermal growth compensation
safety_boundary: Mechanical design reference only; no spindle/cutting parameters or machine control firmware.

crawl_targets.search: linear rail bearing stepper pulley drag_chain
CNC linear axis carriage ball screw STEP
